purpose.subject: retinue ensemble
purpose.intent: Lock one approved everyone-in-one-room cast image.

prompt.text: ensemble portrait concept art of the cat steward-charmer, violet pard elf, seep-goblin, and badger warden in one coherent charter-house social world, readable silhouettes, deadpan fantasy absurdism, courtly glamour versus frontier grime, dark neutral background
prompt.negativeText: text, watermark, signature, border, muddy composition, unreadable silhouette, parody comedy, meme expression, low contrast focal point

notes.summary: First-pass Nano Banana ensemble concept. Cohesive medieval material language and readable silhouettes, but role specificity drifted off the desired cat-duelist / elf-duelist / goblin-alchemist lane.
works: Group silhouette separation is strong and the cast reads as one world.
Shared painterly medieval material language supports the setting.
The cat steward has immediate charm and authority presence.
fixes: Tighten prompts so the elf reads duelist rather than bard and the goblin reads alchemist rather than groundskeeper.
Push a shared heraldic or favor-marker accent across all four to increase retinue unity.
Increase mid-value contrast on the elf and clarify the goblin tool read.

notes.summary: First-pass Nano Banana enemy-family sheet with strong role separation, but it drifted hard into sci-fi/infographic territory and should be treated as a rejected lane rather than approved canon.
works: Broad versus agile versus ranged silhouettes are clean and memorable.
Role separation reads well at a glance.
Faction cohesion is strong in a purely formal sense.
fixes: Remove sci-fi armor, energy weapons, UI mockup, and infographic labeling; return to legalistic frontier fantasy materials.
Differentiate units with silhouette and costume language that survives low zoom without relying on glow colors.
Rewrite prompt to ban technology language and reinforce charter-house authority, wax, iron, leather, wood, seals, and warrants.

purpose.subject: hub mood
purpose.intent: Define the administrative hall as the baseline hub tone and backdrop.

prompt.text: fantasy outpost hub concept art, frontier charter-house administrative hall, courtly glamour versus frontier grime, warm lamplight against cool stone, readable layout
prompt.negativeText: text, watermark, signature, border, muddy composition, unreadable silhouette, parody comedy, meme expression, low contrast focal point

notes.summary: First-pass Nano Banana environment mood piece. Tone is promising and the courtly-versus-frontier split lands, though the next pass should push bureaucratic storytelling and focal hierarchy.
works: Warm interior versus cold exterior contrast supports the setting well.
Split-level hierarchy sells court protocol above and frontier traffic below.
The hall already feels like an administrative hub rather than a generic tavern.
fixes: Add stronger paperwork, seals, claim ledgers, and queue-management props for deadpan bureaucracy.
Separate official space from public space more clearly with ropes, barriers, or desk geometry.
Strengthen one focal pool of light on the claims desk or dais so the composition lands faster.
